title: Agent sender identity (ADR-066)
description: The [sender] block in an agent extension's axiom-extension.toml. Declares the per-agent display metadata HERALD renders onto each channel surface. The canonical principal (ADR-020 @name:context) is NOT declared here; it is derived from the agent name + owner context.

display_name.description: Human-readable agent name, e.g. "Rivet". Required. Rendered into the possessive surface ("Ben's Rivet 1.0").

avatar_uri.description: Optional avatar. Accepts file:// or https://. Slack/Mattermost need a public https URL; Teams accepts base64 inline.

from_address.description: Optional email From override for this agent. None -> the email adapter default.
